oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Beef market update
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Wasko, Anne
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: The North American beef cattle market has seen record cattle and beef prices in 2025 led by strong demand and tightening cattle supplies. What are the factors that will drive the next phase of the cattle cycle? From 2019 fed price lows to 2025’s re­cord highs, prices will have more than doubled. Beef demand and beef trade have all played significant roles in where prices are today. Prices are expected to remain strong into 2026 al­though most of the gains are likely in the market.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 107-108
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
